trustedSourceSummary: Exact official tests for "passata di pomodoro" were not available in 2025-2026, so the broader official category "passata" was used. No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo's 2025 study recommends DE CECCO and DE RICA as top passata brands, based on laboratory tests confirming real passata, no added water, and no fraud.
